synopsis: The Clone Wars: Agenda is a short, six-page webcomic in The Clone Wars webcomic series. Posted on StarWars.com on October 14, 2008, Agenda leads directly into The Clone Wars television series episode "Destroy Malevolence." The comic was written by Pablo Hidalgo, illustrated and colored by Katie Cook, and lettered by Grant Gould. Agenda is about the Naboo Senator Padmé Amidala being assigned by Supreme Chancellor Palpatine of the Republic on a secret mission to the Kaliida Nebula to negotiate with the surrender of the InterGalactic Banking Clan.
title: The Clone Wars: Agenda
